## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is based on latest `master`
- [ ] Content is accurate and proofread
- [ ] HTML uses `assets/style.css` (no inline theme duplication)
- [ ] Dark theme and color variables are consistent
- [ ] No broken links or missing assets
- [ ] `index.html` updated (if adding a new module)
- [ ] Commit messages follow the `type: description` format
